objective: Determine whether P15's independent semantic failure is an SDK package-export timeout-budget fault or a candidate semantic failure, without rerunning performance or editing product source.

predeclared_method.remaining_sdk_command: pnpm --filter @pumped-fn/sdk exec vitest run tests --exclude tests/package-exports.test.ts
predeclared_method.acceptance: All four commands exit zero, the candidate hashes remain unchanged, and no product or performance evidence changes.

anti_goals: Do not rerun throughput, allocation, retained, cleanup, or the 47-row benchmark.
Do not edit product, test, benchmark, configuration, PR, Git, or prior evidence.
Do not change the package-export assertion or omit failed commands.
Do not repeat an observation until favorable.
Do not claim product progression or release readiness.
required_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
